acceptedIds: Debit or credit card with photo
exceptions: If a voter cannot provide photo ID, they may cast a provisional ballot and provide ID to the Supervisor of Elections before the end of the canvassing period.
provisionalBallotRules: Voter must present qualifying photo ID to the Supervisor of Elections before results are certified.
phonesAtPollsDetail: Use of mobile devices for photographing ballots or using them as a guide is prohibited.
